title: Glandularia amoena
taxonomy: Glandularia amoena is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. It belongs to the genus Glandularia, which is a group of plants commonly known as vervain or ironweed. The species is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Glandularia amoena is a perennial herb that produces small, pink or purple flowers. It is also known by the common name Rosy Verbena.
